expectations.text: Agent runs run_tool.py doctor as the first diagnostic step
expectations.evidence: Starts with codebase exploration (ls, find, grep). Never runs run_tool.py doctor. Uses direct Python code to test heartbeat (lines 131-158).

expectations.text: Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests to test or fix authentication
expectations.evidence: Makes direct curl to signature-config endpoint (line 89) and crafts Python PlatformClient calls directly (lines 131-158).

expectations.text: Agent does NOT attempt to construct or add auth headers
expectations.evidence: Manually constructs PlatformClient with signer and calls send_unified_heartbeat directly (lines 146-158). Also suggests adding Authorization headers manually (line 83).
